case_title: COPENHAGEN HOUSE OF DANISH FURNITURE VS REZA AND MARTJE ATTAR.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $268.96 FILED BY COPENHAGEN HOUSE OF DANISH FURNITURE AS TO DEFENDANT REZA AND MARTJE ATTAR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-25-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT REZA AND MARTJE ATTAR.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COPENHAGEN HOUSE OF DANISH FURNITURE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT REZA AND MARTJE ATTAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
